title: panicum liton
intro: Panicum liton, also known as jointed panicum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Panicum liton include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
